falsification_conditions.condition: The price closes above the 200-day moving average by at least 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a strong bullish trend, contradicting the current HOLD signal and suggesting the pattern is not a bottom but a continuation of an uptrend.

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume exceeds 150% of the 30-day average volume on at least 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained extreme volume would signal strong market participation, invalidating the HOLD by suggesting a blowoff top or breakout rather than a consolidation phase.

falsification_conditions.condition: The 14-day Relative Strength Index (RSI) remains above 70 for the entire 14-day period
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Prolonged overbought conditions would indicate a potential reversal or exhaustion, directly contradicting the current UNKNOWN verdict and suggesting a different market dynamic.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
